compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Enforce that the lean core stays lean.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AST/import-linter fails if anthropic/inspect_ai/langchain*/langgraph*/opentelemetry* is a top-level import in core.
- [ ] Clean-install job: pip install the built wheel (no extras), import rebar + a core command, assert heavy deps NOT importable.
- [ ] Per-extra jobs + one [agents,eval,tracing] union job (catch ResolutionImpossible).
Files: .github/workflows/optionality.yml
compiled_state.title: WS-J3: Optionality CI (import-linter + clean-core-wheel)
